title: L2 script S0 scripts/
purpose: D1.3 defines l2 script s0 scripts for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse.
scope: Owns `D1.3` only; siblings under `D1` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §6 — Branch D — Platform evolution plane (parallel queue)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#6-branch-d-platform-evolution-plane-parallel-queue).
behavior_steps: L2 promotion moves repeatable playbook steps into deterministic scripts under `scripts/`—routing, validation, queue peek, and verify dispatch per [D4.2](D4.2-platform-work-script-extraction.md) script extraction on platform turns.

At pursuit wake, [B1.1](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) mandatory-first requires the conductor to run applicable L2 scripts and use their output before any worker re-implements the same logic in chat.

Each promoted L2 script carries a unit test path under tests/unit/ and, when it replaces manual verify, registers with [G1.1](G1.1-task-verify-router-verifier.md) verify-router per [D6.2](D6.2-platform-done-verify-script-l2.md).
Platform workers complete L2 promotion only when the script exists, tests pass, and catalog or playbook references point to the script—dual-write promotion_queue completion to journal and state.json.

If script extraction marks done without a test, verify-router cannot dispatch the script, or workers duplicate script behavior inline, pursuit fails closed at H2 with the promotion item reopened—never false-complete L2 packaging.

**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.

playbook-keeper + script extraction skills dequeue promotion items.
Validate `D1.3` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `D1.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `D1.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: D1.3 defines l2 script s0 scripts for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse. In practice, the system l2 promotion moves repeatable playbook steps into deterministic scripts under `scripts/`—routing, validation, queue peek, and verify dispatch per [d4.2](d4.2-platform-work-script-extraction.md) script extraction on platform turns, then at pursuit wake, [b1.1](b1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) mandatory-first requires the conductor to run applicable l2 scripts and use their output before any worker re-implements the same logic in chat.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-d 2026-06-28 -->

L2 moves repeatable behavior into S0 scripts under `scripts/`: deterministic, testable, and mandatory-first per [B1.1](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md). Script extraction ([D4.2](D4.2-platform-work-script-extraction.md)) promotes playbook steps that no longer need model judgment—routing, validation, queue peek, verify dispatch.

Each L2 artifact needs a unit test path and, when it replaces manual verify, a verify-router hook ([D6.2](D6.2-platform-done-verify-script-l2.md)). The conductor runs scripts before improvising; workers must not re-implement script logic in chat. Failed promotion leaves the queue item open with H2 packaging, not a false done mark.
